value: We're still building this page. Let us know if it's blocking your workflow.
Paste a scene. Get a structured read — cliches, layers, arcs, critic notes.
Drop a scene or chapter. The coach runs it through Will Storr's sacred-flaw engine, Steven Pressfield's anchors, the seven-layer system, and a freshness pass.
Story layers will appear after you analyze.
Scene was too long — we trimmed it to the maximum length.
Drop two characters and a beat. We replay how they'd play out under your canon — useful before you lock a scene into the draft.
